channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rae Burrell and Dearica Hamby hope time together on Unrivaled team will carry over to LA Sparks
item.description: Los Angeles Sparks teammates Rae Burrell and Dearica Hamby are getting the chance to further build their chemistry on and off the court this offseason as they play together at Unrivaled.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ravens are evaluating kickers amid Justin Tucker allegations, John Harbaugh says
item.description: Baltimore Ravens coach John Harbaugh confirmed Tuesday that the team is evaluating kickers amid the Justin Tucker allegations, but clarified that the position was always a "priority.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luka Doncic's Mavericks reunion was 'so weird.' He still gets a triple-double and a W for the Lakers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Although Luka Doncic speaks four languages, he struggled for the words to express just how strange it was to play against the Dallas Mavericks on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vanderbilt guard Mikayla Blakes eager to grow thanks to attention from her record-setting play
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Vanderbilt freshman Mikayla Blakes knows each time she drops the ball in the basket it will bring more attention. That's what happens when someone scores 53 points, then sets the NCAA freshman single-game scoring record with 55 just 17 days later.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump talks 'complicated' PGA Tour-LIV Golf negotiations
item.description: President Donald Trump talked about the negotiations between the PGA Tour and LIV Golf to try to unify the sport once again on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-NFL star implores Eagles to celebrate title at White House, says it would be 'ludicrous' not to
item.description: Former NFL star cornerback Adam "Pacman" Jones said the Philadelphia Eagles, or any team, should go to the White House to celebrate the Super Bowl title.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Matildas condemn misogynistic comments by radio host about Australian women's soccer team
item.description: SYDNEY (AP) — The Matildas joined in the heavy criticism Wednesday of a commercial radio host’s misogynistic and crass comments about Australia’s national women’s soccer team. The host has since been taken off-air.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah wins another tight 2-1 game over Chicago
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is learning how to finish games just in time for a playoff push. Lawson Crouse scored the game-winning goal with 7:48 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 2-1 at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Alex Ovechkin scores 30 goals in a season for an NHL-record-extending 19th time in 20-year career
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin reached 30 goals in a season for the 19th time in his 20-year NHL career, adding to the league record he set last season with his 18th. The Washington Capitals captain got his latest milestone goal Tuesday night at home against the Calgary Flames.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgia recovers from No. 3 Florida's comeback and defeat Gators 88-83 despite Richard's 30 points
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Georgia guard Blue Cain sank a go-ahead 3-pointer with 47 seconds remaining after No. 3 Florida took its first lead by scoring 13 unanswered points, and the Bulldogs beat the Gators 88-83 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants general manager discusses 'taking swings' for quarterback as Matthew Stafford rumors heat up
item.description: It's no secret the New York Giants need a quarterback, and general manager Joe Schoen said he is not opposed to "taking swings" to find his guy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Howie Roseman says the Eagles' roster will change as team begins quest for repeat title
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Howie Roseman’s forehead has healed from the beer can that left him bloodied at the Philadelphia Eagles’ victory parade, and the general manager is working on getting the team in position to repeat.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni pushes back against proposal to ban the tush push
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Philadelphia Eagles coach Nick Sirianni pushed back against the Green Bay Packers' proposal to ban the tush push. “I’ve seen some of the stuff that it’s an automatic play,” Sirianni said Tuesday at the NFL's scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bengals plan to make All-Pro receiver Ja'Marr Chase the NFL's highest-paid non-quarterback
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Cincinnati Bengals plan to make All-Pro wide receiver Ja’Marr Chase the highest-paid non-quarterback in the NFL. “He is going to end up being the No. 1 paid non-quarterback in the league,” director of player personnel Duke Tobin said Tuesday at the NFL scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tar Heels' Davis gets 2-year extension through 2030, hires agent Jim Tanner as GM
item.description: North Carolina coach Hubert Davis has another two years on his deal and a new general manager to help the blueblood men’s basketball program deal with the changing landscape of college athletics. Davis has signed a two-year extension running through the 2029-30 season to lead his alma mater.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cadillac F1 to be managed by global group TWG Motorsports. Dan Towriss named CEO of racing portfolio
item.description: The group that owns Cadillac Formula 1 officially launched TWG Motorsports on Tuesday as the division responsible for its rapidly growing motorsports portfolio.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cleveland Guardians owner Lawrence J. Dolan dies at 94
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lawrence J. Dolan, owner of Cleveland's Major League Baseball team since 2000, has died. He was 94. Dolan died Sunday night of natural causes, the Cleveland Guardians said Monday in a statement. “Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: University of Utah fires head basketball coach Craig Smith
item.description: The University of Utah has fired the head coach of its men's basketball program, Craig Smith. Assistant coach Josh Eilert will take over for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Guenther scores game-winner in 2-1 victory over Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther scored the tiebreaking goal with 5:53 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vancouver Canucks 2-1 at Delta Center on Sunday. Guenther scored on the power play by tipping in a backdoor pass from Nick Schmaltz at the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bell takes only lead in OT to edge Hocevar, Larson in another thrilling NASCAR finish in Atlanta
item.description: Christopher Bell celebrated a drought-ending victory for himself and Joe Gibbs Racing after a dramatic comeback in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: University of Arizona apologizes for offensive chants aimed at BYU basketball team
item.description: The University of Arizona Athletics Department is apologizing after a derogatory chant aimed at BYU players ensued at a men's basketball game Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: BYU wins thriller over #19 Arizona, 96-95
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored a team-high 23 points including two free throws in the final seconds as BYU defeated No. 19 Arizona 96-96 on Saturday evening at a sold out McKale Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Mission Bay 44, Torrey Pines 42
item.description: A big time matchup in boys open division quarters with a #4 and #5 seed matchup, Torrey Pines and Mission Bay.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Thunder cruise past Jazz in first game after break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 21 points and the West-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 130-107 on Friday night for their eighth victory in nine games. Chet Holmgren added 20 points for the Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: One-armed basketball player makes history with basket
item.description: When her high school basketball coach cut her from the team senior year, Baileigh Sinaman-Daniel refused to let that rejection, or the fact she was born with one arm, end her dream.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Connor McDavid scores in OT to give Canada 3-2 win over United States in 4 Nations Face-Off final
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — When they played “O Canada” for the second time, there were no American fans left in the arena to boo.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Armstrong excited about last two months of season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With 56 games down and 26 to go, the Utah Hockey Club is right in the mix for a playoff spot in its first season in Salt Lake City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama to miss remainder of season after blood clot diagnosis
item.description: San Antonio star Victor Wembanyama's season is over after he was diagnosed with a blood clot in his right shoulder, a condition that will sideline one of the league's brightest stars and is the second massive health-related hit for the Spurs in a matter of months.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Former NFL player Chris Kluwe arrested while protesting MAGA sign
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe, an 8-year NFL veteran who played his entire career with the Minnesota Vikings, took to the podium to voice his opposition to the plaque design.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Mastroeni prepares Real Salt Lake for a physical battle in Costa Rica
item.description: Real Salt Lake head coach Pablo Mastroeni anticipates a fierce contest as his team travels to Costa Rica for their first competitive match of 2025 — a CONCACAF Champions Cup Round One clash against reigning Costa Rican champions CS Herediano.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4
